name: claude-plugins
description: Personal collection of Claude Code plugins for development workflows, task automation, and specialized tools

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Git workflow commands: smart commit, code review, and test generation

plugins.name: justfile-expert
plugins.description: Expert guidance for Just task runner and justfiles

plugins.name: tmux-tools
plugins.description: Remote control tmux sessions for interactive CLIs

plugins.name: sudolang-prompter
plugins.description: Create efficient LLM prompts using SudoLang pseudolanguage syntax

plugins.name: web-browser
plugins.description: Browse and interact with web pages via Chrome DevTools Protocol

plugins.name: agent-commands
plugins.description: Session handoff, pickup, release, and changelog workflow commands
